control.title: Balanced / Control
control.communication_goal: Provide a clear, balanced explanation of the clinical note for a general patient audience.

spanish.title: Spanish
spanish.communication_goal: Provide the same core explanation in patient-friendly Spanish.

trust_building.title: Trust-building
trust_building.communication_goal: Affirm the patient's ability to understand, reflect, and participate in decisions with their care team.

technical_uncertainty.title: Technical + explicit uncertainty
technical_uncertainty.communication_goal: Preserve more clinical terminology and state uncertainties explicitly.

simple_vague_uncertainty.title: Simpler + broad uncertainty
simple_vague_uncertainty.communication_goal: Use simpler wording, shorter sentences, and a broad sense of what still needs monitoring.
